Summary: The Original Black PlayStation 2 is Sony's second-generation home console and remains the best-selling video game console of all time. Its black finish became the signature look of the PS2 throughout most of its lifecycle.
The Ceramic White PlayStation 2 was one of the earliest official colour variants released by Sony. It offered the same hardware as the standard console in a distinctive white finish.
The Ocean Blue PlayStation 2 featured a translucent blue shell and is one of the most iconic early PS2 special editions. It remains highly desirable among collectors.
The Automobile Metallic Silver PlayStation 2 showcased a premium metallic finish inspired by automotive paint. It was released as a limited edition in Japan.
The Sakura Pink PlayStation 2 brought a vibrant colour option to Sony's console lineup and was aimed at expanding the console's appeal.
The Aqua Blue PlayStation 2 featured a rich blue finish and was released as an official retail colour variation.
The PlayStation 2 Slim redesigned the original console into a significantly smaller and lighter form factor while maintaining compatibility with nearly the entire PS2 library.
The Ceramic White PS2 Slim offered the redesigned console in a clean white finish while retaining the same compact hardware.
The Satin Silver PS2 Slim became one of the most popular colour options for the slimline console and was widely available.
The Pink PS2 Slim was released in selected markets and became one of Sony's most recognizable coloured slim consoles.

Edition Name: PS2 Slim Final Fantasy XII Pack
Official Name: Sony PlayStation 2 Slim Final Fantasy XII Pack
Summary: This official bundle celebrated the launch of Final Fantasy XII with an exclusive white PlayStation 2 Slim featuring themed branding and matching accessories.
The Gundam Edition PlayStation 2 Slim was released to commemorate the popular Gundam franchise and featured exclusive themed artwork and packaging.
